channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Trees overgrown and severely restricting cycle/footpath on bishops cleeve bypass between the traffic crossing at Stoke road to the island joining finlay way., 18th May
item.description:
Trees are overgrown and severely restricting cycle/footpath on bishops cleeve bypass between the traffic crossing at Stoke road to the island joining finlay way. It’s head clearance issue too
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road

item.title: 2 potholes in the middle of the road both large and deep., 18th May
item.description:
One outside block of flats entrance with the other pothole a couple of metres down the street nearer high street turning.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 377, High Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 18th May
item.description:
4 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole approx 600x700x40mm tarmac patch plus x1 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unpermitted roadworks problem, 18th May
item.description:
Customer is from Parish Council and signs have been erected for telegraph post installations by Openreach. Residents would like to know where they will be placed as they cannot get hold of BT/Opnereach unless a premium rate is paid. There is an objection website but this does not help in providing a location either. Do Streetworks or the depot team have any information for the PC to act on or details to contact BT/Openreach directly. Ps, nothing on One.Network about these permits.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree fallen / pushed over, 18th May
item.description:
Tree is at ///hiring.miles.beyond - think it's been dead for a while and has fallen over or been pushed over.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westmead Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: Dangerous and exposed fixings, 18th May
item.description:
There is a street sign outside papa johns pizza in hillview road hucclecote that has dangerous and sharp edges. it ripped by coat and its a eye level and dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillview Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roadwork signs left behind, 18th May
item.description:
Bishops Cleeve along main road just after the Cloisters, before the roundabout and also in the Cloisters on the left on the grassy verge/play area. They have been there over a month now. Please could they be removed?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Cloisters, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous sign fixing on disused parking sign, 18th May
item.description:
There is a street sign outside papa johns pizza in hillview road hucclecote that has dangerous and sharp edges. it ripped my coat and its a eye level and dangerous. it has very sharp exposed edges on a pathway used by school children and other pedestrians
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cowsley Drive, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor
